implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: ModeBChainPlanner class + plan_next_stage function exposed at forge.pipeline.mode_b_planner with documented signature
AUTOBUILD approved + diff -> PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW; AUTOBUILD approved + no diff -> None (deferred to TASK-MBC8-006)
Forbidden stages raise ModeBoundaryViolation referencing ASSUM-013
permitted_stages frozenset(MODE_B_CHAIN) exposed for Supervisor scoping (TASK-MBC8-008)
Hard-stop / failed FEATURE_SPEC -> next_stage = None with rationale
Empty FEATURE_SPEC artefacts -> next_stage = None + MissingSpecArtefacts diagnostic
Unit tests cover all 12 Mode B Group A/B/C scenarios

completion_promises.criterion_text: `forge.pipeline.mode_b_planner` module exposes `ModeBChainPlanner` class (or `plan_next_stage` function) with signature `(build: Build, history: Sequence[StageEntry]) -> ModeBPlan` where `ModeBPlan` exposes `permitted_stages: frozenset[StageClass]` and `next_stage: StageClass | None`
completion_promises.evidence: src/forge/pipeline/mode_b_planner.py defines `ModeBChainPlanner.plan_next_stage(self, build: Build, history: Sequence[StageEntry]) -> ModeBPlan` plus a module-level `plan_next_stage()` function with the same signature. `ModeBPlan` is a frozen dataclass with `permitted_stages: frozenset[StageClass]` and `next_stage: StageClass | None` (plus `rationale` and `diagnostics`). Verified by TestModuleAndSignature::test_class_importable_from_mode_b_planner_module, test_plan_next_stage_returns_mode_b_plan, test_module_function_matches_class_method.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Planner returns `next_stage = FEATURE_SPEC` when history is empty
completion_promises.evidence: Empty-history branch in `plan_next_stage` returns `_advance(StageClass.FEATURE_SPEC)`. Verified by TestEmptyHistoryAdvance::test_plan_next_stage_with_empty_history_returns_feature_spec.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Planner returns `next_stage = FEATURE_PLAN` only after a `FEATURE_SPEC` entry with `status=approved` is recorded
completion_promises.evidence: `plan_next_stage` advances to FEATURE_PLAN only when the latest FEATURE_SPEC entry has status==APPROVED and non-empty artefacts. Status != APPROVED returns None with `_wait` rationale; HARD_STOP/FAILED return None with halt rationale. Verified by TestChainAdvanceScenarioOutline::test_plan_next_stage_after_feature_spec_approved_returns_feature_plan and TestModeBGroupBScenarios::test_b2_no_dispatch_until_prerequisite_approved_outline.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Planner returns `next_stage = AUTOBUILD` only after `FEATURE_PLAN` is approved (Group B Scenario Outline rows verbatim)
completion_promises.evidence: After FEATURE_SPEC approved, planner only advances to AUTOBUILD when latest FEATURE_PLAN entry has status==APPROVED. Verified by TestChainAdvanceScenarioOutline::test_plan_next_stage_after_feature_plan_approved_returns_autobuild and TestModeBGroupBScenarios::test_b2_no_dispatch_until_prerequisite_approved_outline (autobuild branch).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Planner returns `next_stage = PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW` only after `AUTOBUILD` is approved AND the autobuild produced a non-empty diff against the base branch (delegated to TASK-MBC8-006 for the no-diff branch — this planner just returns `None` for the no-diff case so the terminal handler can decide)
completion_promises.evidence: When AUTOBUILD entry has status==APPROVED, planner reads `details['diff_present']`: True advances to PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW; False returns next_stage=None with rationale 'autobuild produced no diff... deferring terminal decision to TASK-MBC8-006 no-diff handler' and zero diagnostics (terminal handler decides). Verified by TestChainAdvanceScenarioOutline::test_plan_next_stage_after_autobuild_with_diff_returns_pull_request_review and ::test_plan_next_stage_after_autobuild_without_diff_returns_none.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Planner refuses to issue a dispatch for any stage in `MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES`; if such a stage is requested via a manifest, planner raises `ModeBoundaryViolation` with the stage name and a reference to ASSUM-013
completion_promises.evidence: `_enforce_boundary` walks history and raises `ModeBoundaryViolation` for any entry whose stage is in MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES. Exception message names the stage value and references 'ASSUM-013'; carries `assumption='ASSUM-013'`, `stage`, `build_id` attributes. Verified by TestSecurityBoundary::test_plan_next_stage_with_forbidden_stage_raises_mode_boundary_violation (parametrized over PRODUCT_OWNER, ARCHITECT, SYSTEM_ARCH, SYSTEM_DESIGN) and ::test_violation_message_names_forbidden_stage_and_assumption.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Planner returns `permitted_stages` as a `frozenset` reflecting only the Mode B chain; `Supervisor.next_turn` uses this to scope the dispatch switch in TASK-MBC8-008
completion_promises.evidence: `MODE_B_PERMITTED_STAGES = frozenset(MODE_B_CHAIN)` is set on every returned `ModeBPlan.permitted_stages` (advance, halt, wait paths all share the helper). Verified by TestPermittedStages::test_permitted_stages_equals_mode_b_chain_frozenset, ::test_permitted_stages_excludes_mode_a_pre_feature_spec_stages, and ::test_permitted_stages_excludes_mode_c_only_stages.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Hard-stop on `FEATURE_SPEC` (Group C negative case) returns `next_stage = None` with a recorded rationale; planner does not advance the build
completion_promises.evidence: When latest FEATURE_SPEC entry has status==HARD_STOP or FAILED, planner returns `_halt(rationale='Mode B halted at feature-specification ...')` with next_stage=None. Verified by TestHardStopOnFeatureSpec::test_plan_next_stage_with_hard_stop_feature_spec_returns_none and ::test_plan_next_stage_with_failed_feature_spec_dispatch_returns_none, and Group C scenario tests TestModeBGroupCScenarios::test_c1_hard_stop_on_feature_spec_terminates_no_later_dispatch and ::test_c2_failed_spec_halts_before_planning.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty `FEATURE_SPEC` artefacts (Group B boundary case) returns `next_stage = None` and the planner emits a `MissingSpecArtefacts` diagnostic that the Supervisor records as a flag-for-review with missing-spec rationale
completion_promises.evidence: `_has_empty_artefacts` detects empty `details['artefact_paths']` OR explicit `status=='empty_artefacts'`. Returns `ModeBPlan(next_stage=None, rationale='missing-spec: ...', diagnostics=(MissingSpecArtefacts(build_id, feature_id, rationale='missing-spec: ...'),))`. Verified by TestEmptySpecArtefacts::test_plan_next_stage_with_empty_artefacts_returns_none_and_emits_diagnostic, ::test_plan_next_stage_with_explicit_empty_artefacts_status, and ::test_plan_next_stage_with_non_empty_artefacts_does_not_emit_diagnostic.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all 12 Mode B Group A/B/C scenarios from the feature file (use scenario titles as test names where reasonable)
completion_promises.evidence: TestModeBGroupAScenarios covers 6 Group A scenarios (test_a1..test_a6 — full chain to PR with diff, spec→plan→autobuild ordering, autobuild dispatch returned, PR pinned regardless of upstream scores, flag-for-review pause and resume, completed PR review records terminal). TestModeBGroupBScenarios covers 3 Group B scenarios (test_b1..test_b3 — single feature one PR pause, no dispatch before prereq approved [scenario outline], no spec artefacts records missing-spec rationale). TestModeBGroupCScenarios covers 3 Group C scenarios (test_c1..test_c3 — hard-stop on feature-spec, failed spec halts before planning, autobuild hard-stop halts before PR). Total = 12 scenarios. Test names correspond to scenario titles where natural.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Implementation follows project Python style (PEP 8, Black-compatible 88-col, type hints, snake_case functions / PascalCase classes / UPPER_CASE constants per .claude/rules/code-style.md). No bare excepts; one defensive try/except for non-Sized artefacts in `_has_empty_artefacts`. All public symbols documented with Google-style docstrings; module __all__ exports the public surface. Pure-function design — no I/O, no async, no logging side-effects beyond the implicit logger pattern (planner does not log). Run `python3 -m pytest tests/forge/test_mode_b_planner.py` returns 39 passed in 0.19s. Adjacent test suites (per_feature_sequencer, stage_ordering_guard, ordering) all pass with no regression.
